name: accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoicing and payment tracking instead of manual tracking and invoicing processes.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of payments and outstanding balances.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient tracking of payments and outstanding balances.
